channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Body of suspected bear attack victim found on mountain
item.description: Fatal maulings in the last three months have increased fivefold compared to last year, government data shows.

item.title: Watch: Big Bear Valley bald eaglet accidentally falls from nest
item.description: A bald eaglet from Jackie and Shadow's nest in California took an unexpected tumble while fledging.

item.title: U.S.-Iran peace talks progress slowly, complicated by Israel-Hezbollah conflict
item.description: A long-term U.S.-Iran peace deal may hinge on a separate Israel-Lebanon agreement, analysts say, posing a challenge.

item.title: GOP Rep. Tom Kean expected to return to Congress today after undisclosed illness
item.description: The New Jersey congressman missed over 140 votes since March 5, with few details provided about his medical condition.
